LCC-HS12-L1-BR300-HSCE-ARA-CFI-02 • HS Civics and Economics: Grade 12 — Tensions within Constitutional Democracy • ARA • CFI

The Two-Seal Charter

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student about a historical document. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the main idea of the conversation?
2QUESTION 2: According to the teacher, why did the elders refuse to seal the territorial assembly's vote?
3QUESTION 3: What does the teacher's final question suggest scholars still debate about the charter?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Say one thing the teacher says and one thing the student says out loud.
